overview: D'Mora Cafe & Bistro is a stylish, cozy, and pet-friendly vegetarian cafe on College Road, Nashik. This website features a full digital menu, table reservations, online ordering with UPI payment, customer reviews, photo gallery, and smooth scroll animations — all in English.
features: Hero section with animations and CTA buttons
Digital menu with search and categories
Customer reviews from Google, Zomato, Justdial
